title: Ultra Cosplay Baseball Bat with Barbed Wire Fake Toy Weapon No Sharp Edges Halloween Prop Bloodied Replica Fake Wooden Bat for Costume Play Events Halloween Zombie Smasher Plastic Adults Kids Props
features: Clear those rooms and areas of the infected and zombies with this excellent baseball bat, designed to look great and feel lightweight. It is made from lightweight plastic.
The design of the bat incorporates bloody barbed wire. It has no sharp edges or small parts, so there is no need to worry about injuries or accidents.
Measuring 74cm, its long enough to look authentic and have a great look, but also the perfect size not to weigh you down or make you encumbered
With a fake wooden shaft in a mottled brown effect, in the dark and at events and parties, this looks cool and fun; everyone will want to wield it and smash some zombies.

Nothing says rack them up and clear them out like a baseball bat. Truly the most fun and brutal of all halloween prop weapons available, this is the ultimate weapon of choice for theatre productions, costume play or fancy dress
